summary: Comprehensive testing of SEO-friendly fabric URL slugs feature. All 12 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend slug features verified via Playwright - fabric links use slugs, detail pages load via slug URLs, and UUID backward compatibility works.

issues: Console shows 404 errors for some resources (likely missing images/assets) - not blocking functionality

passed_tests: GET /api/fabrics returns slug field in response for all fabrics
GET /api/fabrics/{uuid} still works for UUID-based lookup (backward compat)
POST /api/fabrics auto-generates slug from fabric name
PUT /api/fabrics/{id} regenerates slug when name changes
Sitemap.xml exists and is valid XML
All 192 migrated fabrics have slugs (100% coverage)
Agent login endpoints regression check - PASS
Slug format validation - all slugs are lowercase with hex suffix
Example slug format matches expected pattern (e.g., test-vendor-fabric-pending-approval-92fe67)
Frontend FabricsPage uses slug links (10/10 links checked use slug format)
Frontend FabricDetailPage loads via slug URL
Frontend FabricDetailPage loads via UUID URL (backward compat)
critical_code_review_comments: Slug generation in slug_utils.py correctly creates SEO-friendly URLs with 6-char hex suffix
Backend get_fabric endpoint (line 1248-1255) correctly tries ID first, then slug lookup
Backend create_fabric (line 1292-1294) auto-generates slug using generate_slug()
Backend update_fabric (line 1316-1319) regenerates slug when name changes
Backend normalize_fabric (line 796-798) generates slug for legacy fabrics without one
Frontend FabricsPage.js (line 613, 637) uses fabric.slug || fabric.id for links
Frontend FabricDetailPage.js (line 965, 987) uses slug for related fabrics and other sellers links
context_for_next_testing_agent: SEO-friendly fabric URL slugs fully implemented and tested. Key features: 1) All 192 fabrics have slugs in format 'name-6char-hex' (e.g., test-vendor-fabric-pending-approval-92fe67), 2) GET /api/fabrics/{slug} works for slug lookup, 3) GET /api/fabrics/{uuid} still works for backward compatibility, 4) POST creates slug automatically, 5) PUT regenerates slug when name changes, 6) Frontend uses slug || id pattern for all fabric links.

slug_in_api_response.details: All 192 fabrics have slug field in GET /api/fabrics response

uuid_backward_compat.details: GET /api/fabrics/{uuid} still works for old URLs

slug_regeneration_on_update.details: PUT /api/fabrics/{id} regenerates slug when name changes

frontend_detail_page_slug.details: FabricDetailPage loads correctly via slug URL

frontend_detail_page_uuid.details: FabricDetailPage loads correctly via UUID URL (backward compat)

commission_regression.details: Commission rules and calculate-preview endpoints work

agent_login_regression.details: Agent OTP endpoints return valid JSON
